focus: Kakao Business Channel chatbot — Phase 1 infrastructure complete; spec, data inventory, and roadmap grounded

system_context.what_shareplan_is: A subscription sharing intermediary. Sells YouTube Premium (6mo/12mo) and Coursera Plus to Korean customers acquired via ppomppu.co.kr forum. Payments via bank transfer. Operator manages conversations manually via Kakao Business Channel.
system_context.what_this_project_is: A completely separate subsystem from the publisher/scheduler. Goal: capture all channel conversations, annotate them, populate a Kakao Knowledge Base, and eventually automate replies using OpenAI. The publisher must never be touched by Kakao code.
system_context.current_state: Phase 1 done. Webhook is wired but 0 Open Builder blocks connected — safe. Spec written. Data inventoried.

completed.item: Feasibility assessment: two-way Kakao messaging architecture confirmed
completed.detail: Kakao requires server-side webhook (Skill) for receive; replies returned in same HTTP response. No polling API. No historical retrieval API.

completed.item: .env reorganized — Kakao keys renamed to standard names, duplicates removed
completed.detail: KAKAO_BUSINESS_ID→KAKAO_CHANNEL_ID, KAKAO_BUSINESS_AUTH_KEY→KAKAO_SKILL_SECRET, KAKAO__BASE_URL→KAKAO_BASE_URL, KAKAO_BOT_ID→KAKAO_OPENBUILDER_BOT_ID. Two-app section added: chatbot (1433640) and messenger/bizmessage (1377955).

completed.item: Phase 1 implementation: lib/kakaoSkill.ts + POST /kakao-webhook route + env additions
completed.detail: Webhook validates bot ID, logs to artifacts/kakao-history/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl (sync appendFileSync), returns Kakao 2.0 ACK. Kill-switch KAKAO_WEBHOOK_ENABLED defaults false. No HMAC yet.

completed.item: Data inventory: 156 CSV conversations analyzed, KB template schema extracted
completed.detail: CSVs span 2024-11-23 to 2026-04-15. Schema: DATE,USER,MESSAGE. Speakers: SharePlan (operator), SharePlan(메뉴) (automated menu), customer name. KB template: 11-column Kakao FAQ format.
Business context, channel architecture, data schema, 5-phase roadmap, env vars, safety constraints, open questions.

kakao_credential_map.note: All keys in .env. Do not re-derive from elsewhere.

ngrok.note: Free domain — survives restarts but requires ngrok process running. Run: ngrok http 3000

kakao_webhook.note: Safe to leave running. Will only fire when a block is connected in Open Builder.

open_questions: KAKAO_CHANNEL_ID=oG31Ot1mRmPGYEb8uvsDnzdUtufCosrx — verify this is the plusFriendId for @shareplan. Check Channel Partner Center → Channel info.
KAKAO_SKILL_SECRET=yC4xCD5A45Bxug56RVV9ZBTiUTpEEDh1 — verify this is from Open Builder → Skills → Main_Skill_Dev → Security Settings.
ngrok is on free plan — URL stable but requires process to be running. Evaluate Tailscale tunnel or VPS for persistent access.
OPENAI_API_KEY not yet in .env — needed for Phase 5 auto-reply. Add when that phase begins.

notes: conv_id from CSV filename (basename without extension)

validation.integration_tests: not applicable (new subsystem, no tests written yet)

session_boundary_recommendation.recommended_cut: Phase 1 infrastructure complete and spec grounded. Clean cut before Phase 2 (data ingestion pipeline).
reason: kakao-chatbot-v1.json provides complete context for any future session to continue without re-deriving architecture.
All env keys are named, organized, and documented.
Phase 2 is a self-contained scripting task that starts fresh without depending on this session's working memory.
